task: put the pink object inside the right cabinet
raw:
Scene: pink_object, right_cabinet, tray, table
Step 1: reach(pink_object)
  affordance_region: the pink object on the tray
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, pink_object, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, pink_object) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(pink_object)
  affordance_region: the pink object on the tray
  contact: holding(pink_object) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(pink_object)
Step 3: transport(pink_object -> right_cabinet)
  affordance_region: the empty area inside the right cabinet
  spatial: above(pink_object, right_cabinet, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(pink_object)
  done_when: above(pink_object, right_cabinet, 0.05)
Step 4: place(pink_object -> right_cabinet)
  affordance_region: the empty area inside the right cabinet
  contact: surface_contact(pink_object, right_cabinet) [completion]; released(pink_object) [completion]
  pose: stable(pink_object) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(pink_object, right_cabinet) AND released(pink_object) AND stable(pink_object)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the pink object on the tray
the pink object on the tray
the empty area inside the right cabinet
the empty area inside the right cabinet
steps.done_when: surface_contact(pink_object, right_cabinet) AND released(pink_object) AND stable(pink_object)
